chunks.text: April IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar April IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, April 9th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux server

l 9th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday or Wednesday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, April 10th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, de

ERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases), and login.eecs will be patched and rebooted Tuesday night. DNS servers cr

patched and rebooted Tuesday night. DNS servers cronus and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, April 10th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (ac

is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). UPDATE [2024-04-10 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2024-04-10 10:30pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Schedul
e Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
